title: Nexus StrategyPatchStateRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/strategies/{strategy_id}/states/{state_id}/patch (V1.71). Renames and/or updates the description of a single outer state-machine state.

strategy_id.description: Preset / Strategy identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

state_id.description: State identifier from the URL path. Must match the path parameter.

base_revision.description: Revision observed by the client on the last canonical read.

set.description: Fields to update on the state. At least one property must be provided.

label.description: New human-facing state id/label. Renaming a state also rewrites all references (next targets, initial, terminal).
